Quality Education.reason: As a university course, it provides tertiary education (Target 4.3) and skills for employment (Target 4.4), but its content does not focus on improving education systems.

Partnerships for the Goals.reason: The topic "Citizen participation and government governance" promotes public and civil society partnerships (Target 17.17) and enhances policy coherence for sustainable development (Target 17.14).
